pe:description: Four-phase pipeline extracting design tokens from Figma via MCP, classifying into three-tier cascade (Primitive/Semantic/Component), validating against DS-ONT business rules, and populating DS instance JSONLD files per PF-Instance brand.
pe:businessObjective: Automate design-to-data flow: Figma source of truth into ontology-compliant instance data for multi-brand PFI resolution.
pe:scope: Single Figma file key per brand variant; outputs one DS instance JSONLD per execution.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Call Figma MCP get_variable_defs on root node of target Figma file. Collect raw variable collections.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: figmaFileKey present in DS-ONT instanceData entry; Figma MCP authenticated
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Raw extraction JSON contains at least 1 variable collection with 5+ variables
pe:hasPhase.pe:activities: 1. Read figmaFileKey from DS-ONT Entry instanceData. 2. Call get_variable_defs(fileKey, nodeId=0:1). 3. Optionally call get_metadata to discover variable collection node IDs. 4. For each collection node, call get_variable_defs. 5. Merge all variable definitions into extraction log JSON.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Classify extracted Figma variables into Primitive, Semantic, and Component tiers per DS-ONT TokenTier enumeration.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Raw extraction JSON from Phase 1 available
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: All tokens classified into exactly one tier; tier counts logged
pe:hasPhase.pe:activities: 1. Parse Figma variable names using slash-path convention (collection/group/name). 2. Apply classification rules: colour scales and raw values = Primitive; intent-named tokens (surface/text/border/accent/feedback) = Semantic; component-scoped tokens (button/card/input prefix) = Component. 3. Generate TokenCategory entries per DS-ONT schema. 4. Map valueType using DS-ONT TokenValueType enum (Color/Spacing/Radius/Typography/Shadow/Border/Opacity).

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Validate classified tokens against DS-ONT business rules BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Classified token arrays from Phase 2 available
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Zero blocking violations; all warnings documented
pe:hasPhase.pe:activities: 1. BR-DS-001: Semantic tokens must reference a known primitive. 2. BR-DS-002: Component tokens must reference a semantic. 3. BR-DS-003: All consumed component tokens must exist. 4. BR-DS-004: If themeModeSupport=true, semantics need light+dark values. 5. BR-DS-005: Figma sources older than 7 days flagged Stale. 6. BR-DS-006: Every brand variant must bind to a FigmaSource. 7. Required property completeness per entity type.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Generate the DS instance JSONLD file conforming to DS-ONT entity definitions.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Validation gate passed with zero blocking errors
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Valid JSONLD file written; instanceData entry updated in registry
pe:hasPhase.pe:activities: 1. Assemble @graph array: DesignSystem root, TokenCategories, PrimitiveTokens[], SemanticTokens[], ComponentTokens[], BrandVariant, FigmaSource, ThemeModes, DesignPatterns. 2. Write to instance-data/{brand}-ds-instance-v{version}.jsonld. 3. Write extraction log to instance-data/{brand}-extraction-log.json. 4. Update Entry-ONT-DS-001.json instanceData entry: status=populated, extractedAt=now.

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Verify raw extraction contains minimum viable token set
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: At least 10 colour tokens, 3 spacing tokens, 2 radius tokens extracted

pe:hasGate.pe:description: All tokens classified into exactly one tier with valid valueType
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Zero unclassified tokens; all tokens have DS-ONT enum-valid valueType

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Instance data conforms to DS-ONT business rules
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Zero severity=error rule violations from BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Output file is valid JSON-LD with correct @context and @graph
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Valid JSON; @context contains ds: prefix; @graph has DesignSystem + BrandVariant + FigmaSource + at least 1 token per tier

pe:augmentedBy.pe:description: Claude Code agent with Figma MCP access executing the four-phase extraction pipeline
pe:augmentedBy.pe:capabilities: Figma MCP get_variable_defs, get_metadata, get_design_context; token classification; JSONLD generation; DS-ONT business rule validation
